title: erigeron alpinus
intro: Erigeron alpinus, also known as the alpine fleabane or alpine daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family, Asteraceae. It is native to high-altitude regions in Europe and Asia and is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's leaves and flowers have been used to treat various health issues, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory problems, and it is also said to have antioxidant and antimicrobial properties. Erigeron alpinus can be prepared as a tea or tincture, and its leaves and flowers can be dried and used as an herbal remedy.
